title: Debug missing pickup visuals in clungiverse

log.context: Debug missing pickup visuals in clungiverse

Root cause and fix:

**Root cause:** Stale bundle. Two commits added floor pickup rendering to the source (`clungiverse-client/src/renderer/dungeon-renderer.ts`) — "Render HP heart pickups distinctly" and "Add client rendering for temp powerups" — but the build script (`bash build.sh`) was never re-run. The served bundle at `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/clungiverse/main.js` was from 07:01, while the source was last modified at 23:18. The rendering code was fully absent from what players download...(truncated)
